label: nr5-live183-20m-14230-nr5-aware-leveler
recommendations: RX audio leveler boost slew limited one or more samples; weak-signal loudness may still be settling during this trace.

NR5 output diagnostics and final audio leveler input diverged by more than 12 dB on one or more samples; use nr5AudioAlignmentWatch before treating low-evidence lift/dropout rows as same-block DSP facts.
NR5 output moved more than input during the trace; reduce makeup/recovery memory before increasing weak-signal gain.
NR5 weak-input dropouts were observed; inspect nr5WeakSignalWatch.topWeakDropouts before increasing global makeup gain.
Some weak NR5 samples left the output below the input; prefer bounded weak-frame rescue over persistent makeup gain.
NR5 suppressed low-evidence weak samples instead of normalizing them; confirm the trace is noise-only or adjacent-channel noise before using it as weak-signal loss evidence.
liveRecommendedActions: Capture a G2 live benchmark run and compare against the offline fixture baseline before changing any default.
